title: service.endpoint Facet
description: Demanded by the K8s Services collector (ADR-0081): the capability seam of a `service` Entity — where it is reachable and how. A projection of the service's actual state (§1.2, K8s Service spec), observed by the collector; never authored (the writable-CMDB non-goal). `protocol` is an OPEN string (§1.4). Single §2.1 write-owner. Validated at the Projector write path (enforce_write_path).

protocol.description: OPEN: http | grpc | tcp | udp | queue | … (an axis of variation, not a namespace-per-protocol).

selector.description: The label selector naming what backs this service (the workloads it fronts).
